title: outl plugin registry (v1)
description: Static index of installable outl plugins. One JSON file, read over raw GitHub by the CLI and GUI clients.

updated.description: ISO date of the last edit (informational).

id.description: Reverse-DNS id, identical to the plugin's plugin.json `id`.

repository.description: Install source, e.g. `github:user/repo` or `github:user/repo/subdir`. `outl plugin install` resolves it at a tag.

capabilities.description: Declared capabilities, mirrored from plugin.json — powers discovery filters.

permissions.description: Declared permissions, mirrored from plugin.json — so users see the ask before installing.

latest.description: Latest published semver tag (without a leading `v`).
